title: Confirm Clone from the current editable Demo copy
objective: Present an accessible Clone confirmation that clearly uses the current validated Demo copy and remains separate from Reset.
acceptanceCriteria: Label the Clone source as 目前示範副本 and summarize included edited itinerary and Checklist content.
Explain excluded expenses, settlements, tickets, attachments, fictional members, and Demo-only data.
Explain owner-only output and unverified text-only places.
Keep Clone and Reset as distinct actions, confirmations, accessible names, and state machines.
Disable duplicate confirmation and expose accessible loading, error, success, and repair states.
Do not read or write Firebase, myTrips, Offline Cache, Storage, or production configuration.
